title: Maintainer Firewall Configuration
description: Configuration for Maintainer Firewall. Partial configs are supported; omitted fields use the documented defaults.

version.description: Configuration format version. Keep this at 1 for the current schema.

issue.description: Controls deterministic checks for GitHub issues.

enabled.description: Run Maintainer Firewall checks on issues.

minBodyCharacters.description: Minimum issue body length before the issue is considered to have enough context.

requireReproduction.description: Ask for reproduction details when issue text does not include them.

requireEnvironment.description: Ask for environment details when issue text does not include them.

duplicateSearchLimit.description: Maximum number of similar issues to inspect when looking for possible duplicates.

requiredSections.description: Issue-template section headings that must appear in the issue body.

pullRequest.description: Controls deterministic checks for pull requests.

enabled.description: Run Maintainer Firewall checks on pull requests.

minBodyCharacters.description: Minimum pull request body length before the pull request is considered to have enough context.

requireLinkedIssue.description: Ask contributors to link an issue or explain why one is not needed.

requireTestsForCodeChanges.description: Ask for tests or a test-plan explanation when code changes do not include matching test files.

largeChangeThreshold.description: Changed-line count that marks a pull request as large enough to need maintainer attention.

sensitivePaths.description: Glob patterns for files that should trigger a maintainer-review finding when changed.

testPathPatterns.description: Glob patterns used to identify test files in pull request changes.

requiredSections.description: Pull-request-template section headings that must appear in the pull request body.

repository.description: Controls repository guidance and ownership context used in reports and AI prompts.

guidancePaths.description: Repository files to load as contribution guidance, such as CONTRIBUTING files and issue or pull request templates.

codeOwnersPaths.description: CODEOWNERS file locations used to add owner-routing hints for changed pull request files.

maxGuidanceCharacters.description: Maximum combined guidance text loaded from repository guidance files.

security.description: Controls security-sensitive language detection and secret redaction.

enabled.description: Run security-sensitive language and exposed-secret checks.

reportPatterns.description: Regular expressions that mark text as security-sensitive and route it for maintainer review.

secretPatterns.description: Regular expressions used to redact likely secrets before reports, summaries, and optional AI prompts.

labels.description: Label names applied to findings. These labels are created automatically when labeling.createMissing is true.

needsInfo.description: Label for issues or pull requests that need more context.

needsTests.description: Label for pull requests that need tests or a test-plan explanation.

largeScope.description: Label for pull requests that exceed the configured large-change threshold.

possibleDuplicate.description: Label for issues that look similar to existing issues.

maintainerReview.description: Label for findings that should be routed to maintainers or owners.

labeling.description: Controls how Maintainer Firewall manages labels for active and resolved findings.

enabled.description: Apply labels for findings when the run is not dry-run.

createMissing.description: Create managed labels before applying them when they do not already exist.

removeStale.description: Remove managed labels when their matching findings are no longer present.

comment.description: Controls report comments on issues and pull requests.

enabled.description: Post or update Maintainer Firewall report comments when the run is not dry-run.

updateExisting.description: Update the existing managed report comment instead of adding a new one.

header.description: Heading shown at the top of report comments.

postWhen.description: Controls when report comments are posted: always, only when findings exist, or never.

maxFindings.description: Maximum number of findings shown in the report comment details table.

includePassingChecks.description: Include passing checks in report comments so contributors can see what already looks good.

ignore.description: Skips Maintainer Firewall for trusted automation, explicit skip labels, or configured title patterns.

authors.description: GitHub logins that should skip Maintainer Firewall.

labels.description: Labels that skip Maintainer Firewall when present on the issue or pull request.

titlePatterns.description: Regular expressions that skip Maintainer Firewall when the title matches.

ai.description: Controls optional OpenAI-assisted semantic review. Deterministic checks still run when AI is disabled.

enabled.description: Enable OpenAI-assisted semantic findings. Requires an OpenAI API key input.

model.description: OpenAI model used for semantic review when AI is enabled.

maxInputCharacters.description: Maximum redacted subject and guidance text sent to the model.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum model output tokens for semantic review.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for the OpenAI request in milliseconds.
